meta.title: Chat Enhancer for YouTube - YouTube Live Chat Tools
meta.description: Lightweight translation, mention, quote, profile, emoji, and command tools for YouTube live chat.
meta.ogDescription: Translate messages, mention and quote users, save inbox matches, reuse emojis, and run quick commands in YouTube live chat.
meta.imageAlt: Chat Enhancer for YouTube showing native-feeling live chat translation, inbox, and emoji tools.

hero.eyebrow: Browser extension for YouTube live chat
hero.title: Chat Enhancer for YouTube
hero.copy: Translate messages, mention and quote users, revisit chat context, catch messages you care about, reuse emojis, and run quick commands without replacing YouTube's native chat.

features.title: Small tools where chat already happens
features.translationBody: Choose a target language in the extension popup, then quickly toggle translation from YouTube's live chat settings.
features.mentionBody: Use YouTube's message menu, author clicks, profile cards, or slash commands to mention and quote people faster.
features.contextBody: Open an avatar card to review a user's recent messages in the current chat and jump to their channel when needed.
features.inboxBody: Keep a local list of messages that mention your handle or match your keywords, with an optional subtle sound for new inbox messages.
features.emojisBody: Add a compact row of your most-used emojis to YouTube's emoji picker so common reactions are always close.
features.commandsBody: Press Tab to expand commands for mentions, quotes, repeated messages, time helpers, and extension settings.

screenshots.title:
Native-feeling chat
improvements
screenshots.translationTitle: Read live chat in your language
screenshots.translationBody: Incoming messages are automatically translated with Google Translate into the language you choose.
screenshots.translationHighlightHtml: Automated translations are highlighted with a subtle underline and a Google Translate icon
screenshots.mentionAlt: YouTube live chat inbox and message action menu
screenshots.mentionTitle: Stay in the conversation with easy @mentions and quotes
screenshots.mentionMenuHtml: Click on a message and “Quote” or “Mention”.
screenshots.mentionAuthorHtml: Click on a @username to mention someone. Alt/Option-click on a @username to quote someone.
screenshots.mentionInboxHtml: Never miss a mention: when you’re mentioned in chat, the message is added to your Inbox
screenshots.mentionSound: You can also turn on a sound for notifications.
screenshots.extrasAvatar: Click a user's avatar to see their most recent messages and open their YouTube profile in a new window.
screenshots.extrasEmoji: Find your most used emojis at the top of the emoji picker.
screenshots.extrasCommands: Use Tab slash commands for helpful shortcuts, including:
screenshots.extrasAlt: YouTube live chat profile card, commands, and frequent emoji row
screenshots.commandsFullLinkScreenshot: View full command reference on chatenhancer.com

install.title: Install Chat Enhancer
install.copy: Get it from the Chrome Web Store or Firefox Add-ons, or build the extension from source for local development. The Chrome version may also work in other Chromium-based browsers.
install.updatePendingBody: {stores} will get the latest version soon.
install.supportModalBody: GitHub Issues is the public tracker we use for bug reports and feature requests.
install.supportModalDetailOne: Posting or commenting on GitHub may require a GitHub account.
install.supportModalDetailTwo: Click the New issue button on GitHub to start a report or request.
install.supportModalDetailThree: The issue forms will ask for the details needed for each kind of report.
install.privateQuestions: You can also email us at
install.gettingStartedBody: Install, refresh YouTube once if it was already open, then use the extension where live chat already is.
install.stepStoreBody: Use the Chrome or Firefox button above. Other Chromium-based browsers can generally use the Chrome build.
install.stepRefreshTitle: Open or refresh YouTube live chat
install.stepRefreshBody: Refresh tabs that were already open so the extension can attach to the live chat frame. You'll know it's working when the inbox icon appears in YouTube chat.
install.stepSettingsBody: The extension works in live chat automatically. For complete settings, click the browser toolbar extensions icon and choose Chat Enhancer to reveal all the options. Pin it if you want faster access.
install.stepUseBody: Message menus, avatar cards, the inbox button, frequent emojis, and Tab commands appear and can be used within YouTube's chat interface.
install.stepRefreshBodyBeforeIcon: Refresh tabs that were already open so the extension can attach to the live chat frame. You'll know it's working when the inbox icon
install.stepSettingsBodyBeforeIcon: The extension works in live chat automatically. For complete settings, click the browser toolbar extensions icon
install.stepSettingsBodyAfterIcon: Chat Enhancer to reveal all the options. Pin it if you want faster access.
install.supportModalDetailFour: You can also email us at chatenhanceryt@gmail.com.

privacy.title: Local-first chat tools
privacy.copy: The extension is designed to keep routine chat enhancements on your device. Translation is the one feature that needs an external service, and it only runs after you choose a target language.
privacy.scopeBody: Runs only on YouTube live chat and live chat replay pages.
privacy.storageBody: Settings, inbox messages, watched keywords, and frequent emoji counts stay in browser extension storage.
privacy.translationBody: Off by default. If enabled, message text is sent to Google Translate without your YouTube cookies or credentials.
privacy.trackingBody: No analytics, browsing history collection, data resale, or extension-owned server.

commands.title: Chat commands expand with Tab
commands.copy: Type a command in YouTube's chat input, then press Tab. Commands do not send automatically, and unknown slash commands are left alone. Use // to send a literal slash command.
commands.inlineBody: /mention, /reply, /time, and /timeuntil can expand inside a sentence.
commands.wholeBody: /quote, /again, /repeat, /help, and all /set... commands should be the only text in the input.
commands.mentionDescription: Insert a mention for the author of your newest inbox message.
commands.quoteDescription: Quote the newest message saved in your inbox.
commands.repeatDescription: Restore your last sent message, including rich emoji content when available.
commands.timeDescription: Insert the current time for a supported timezone or city.
commands.timeUntilDescription: Insert the time remaining until the next matching local time.
commands.helpDescription: Open the command help card inside YouTube chat.
commands.setTranslateDescription: Set the translation target language. Use off to disable translation.
commands.setDisplayDescription: Replace original messages with translations. Use below to show translations underneath.
commands.setSoundDescription: Turn inbox sounds on or off.
commands.setPopupDescription: Open channels in popup windows. Use off to open them normally.

footer.disclaimer: Chat Enhancer for YouTube is not affiliated with YouTube or Google.
